'''Clak'dor II''' was the second-innermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] within the [[Colu system]], on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="GatORW" /> After the destruction of [[Clak'dor I]], the world became the [[Star system/Legends|star system's]] innermost.
